entries.title: BOOKS OF SESSIONS 1 KINGS 19:21 on first-kings 19:21
entries.excerpt: "He slaughtered the oxen." He did that not [as a sacrifice] to God, because Elisha was not a priest, but he killed them for a banquet which he offered to his people. From now on, he was lifted above earthly things and did not make use of anything that belonged to this world.
